initiatives.name: Grand Rapids Progressives
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through progressive organizing in Grand Rapids. They coordinate direct action support, political education, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for social justice and collective action.

initiatives.name: Grand Rapids Tenant Union
initiatives.description: A tenant union and advocacy group to build collective power among tenants in Grand Rapids.

initiatives.name: GR Rapid Response to ICE
initiatives.description: We are a network of volunteers in the Grand Rapids, MI area who support members of our community targeted by ICE through mutual aid and direct action.

initiatives.name: Grand Rapid Trans Foundation
initiatives.description: We are a local nonprofit dedicated to nurturing and sustaining Trans futures by creating equitable opportunities, removing barriers, and fostering community.

initiatives.name: Grand Rapids Red Project
initiatives.description: The Grand Rapids Red Project is a 501c3 non-profit organization dedicated to improving health, reducing harm, and preventing HIV.

initiatives.name: Grand Rapids Alliance
initiatives.description: The official account of the Grand Rapids chapter of the National Alliance Against Racist and Political Repression.

initiatives.name: Grand Rapids DSA
initiatives.description: We are the Grand Rapids chapter of the Democratic Socialist of America.

initiatives.name: Socialist Alternative Grand Rapids
initiatives.description: Socialist Alternative is a national organization fighting in our workplaces, communities, and campuses against exploitation and injustice.

initiatives.name: Palestine Solidarity Grand Rapids
initiatives.description: Metro Grand Rapids demanding Palestinian liberation

initiatives.name: GRPOP616
initiatives.description: We perform minor repairs to vehicle lights in order to help minimize interactions between police and marginalized groups in our community.

initiatives.name: Grand Rapids Trans Foundation
initiatives.description: We are a local nonprofit dedicated to nurturing and sustaining Trans futures by creating equitable opportunities, removing barriers, and fostering community.
